This project's golden testing infrastructure (under test/golden/_comparator/)
is inspired by Roborazzi (https://github.com/takahirom/roborazzi),
which is licensed under the Apache License, Version 2.0.

The output file naming conventions (*_compare.png, *_actual.png),
comparison image layout (3-pane grid), JSON report schema, and the
record/verify/compare task type model all follow Roborazzi's specification
for forward compatibility with downstream CI tooling (such as the
screenshot-comparison workflows used by DroidKaigi/conference-app-2025).

The Dart implementation under test/golden/_comparator/ is an independent
clean-room implementation written for the Flutter test runner.
No source code from Roborazzi is included in this repository.

This NOTICE is provided as a courtesy attribution and does not constitute
a redistribution of Roborazzi source code under Section 4 of the
Apache License, Version 2.0.
